backstory.original: Catti-brie is a kind, tolerant, and pragmatic warrior. She has spent much of her life adventuring with the legendary Companions of the Hall, accompanying Drizzt Do'Urden, Bruenor Battlehammer, Regis, and Wulfgar on numerous escapades. As the moral compass of the group, Catti-brie helps guide her companions to wise actions through common sense and clear insight. She wields the legendary bow Taulmaril, which shoots silver arrows.
backstory.display: 凯蒂布莉儿是一位善良、宽容而务实的战士。她一生中的大部分时间，都和传奇的秘银厅同伴们在一起。她陪伴着崔斯特·杜垩登、布鲁诺·战锤、瑞吉斯和沃夫加，进行了无数的冒险。作为团体的道德指南针，凯蒂布莉儿通过常识和清晰的洞察力，引导她的同伴们采取明智的行动。她的武器是能射出银色箭矢的传奇武器陶玛礼穿心弓。

description.original: Catti-brie shoots the farthest enemy with her bow
description.display: 凯蒂布莉儿用她的弓向距离最远的敌人射击。

description.original: Catti-Brie shoots six arrows at once from her bow, making each enemy hit more vulnerable for 30 seconds.
description.display: 凯蒂布莉儿用弓连续射出 6 支箭，使受到攻击的敌人在接下来的 30 秒内进入虚弱状态。

longDescription.original: Catti-Brie shoots six arrows at once from her bow. Each enemy hit by her arrows have a higher chance of being crit, and take more crit damage based on Catti-brie's crit chance and damage for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 凯蒂布莉儿用弓连续射出 6 支箭。根据凯蒂布莉儿的暴击率和伤害，每个被她的箭击中的敌人受到暴击的几率提高，并且受到的暴击伤害提高，持续 30 秒。

description.desc: $source's base chance to Critical Hit is $(amount)%.
$source deals additional damage to enemies the farther they are from the formation, from 0% bonus at $start_percent% away from the formation to $amount% bonus at the spawn point.
$source对距离我方阵型更远的敌人造成额外伤害：敌人距离阵型 $start_percent% 时加成 0%；敌人位于刷新点时加成 $amount%。
Enemies hit by $source's arrows are Marked and take additional damage equal to $source's critical hit damage bonus until the enemy is defeated.
被$source的箭矢击中的敌人会被标记，并受到相当于$source暴击伤害加成的额外伤害，直到敌人被击败。

tipText.original: Catti-brie marks enemies she attacks, causing them to take extra damage.
tipText.display: 凯蒂布莉儿会标记她攻击的敌人，对其造成额外伤害。

description.desc: When an enemy that is Marked is critically hit by any Champion, they are stunned for $(stun_time) seconds and the damage bonus of their Mark is increased by $(amount)%. This effect can only occur every $(cooldown_time) seconds, and the damage bonus increase can stack multiplicatively up to $(max_stacks) times.
被标记的敌人受到任意勇士的暴击时，将被眩晕 $(stun_time) 秒，其标记的伤害加成提高 $(amount)%。此效果每 $(cooldown_time) 秒只能触发一次，伤害加成提高能够以乘算方式堆叠最高 $(max_stacks) 层。

$source increases the damage of herself and all Champions in front of her in the formation by $(not_buffed amount)% each time she gets a critical hit, stacking multiplicatively up to $(max_stacks) times and resetting when she changes areas.
每当$source受到暴击时，使她自己和阵型中所有位于她前列的勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最高 $(max_stacks) 层，并在她改变区域时重置。

tipText.original: Catti-brie increases the damage of Champions in front of her when she gets a critical hit.
tipText.display: 造成暴击时，凯蒂布莉儿会提高其前方勇士的伤害。

description.desc: $source's damage is increased by $(amount)% and her arrows hit all enemies on their way to their target. Each enemy hit has a separate chance of being a critical hit.
$source的伤害提高 $(amount)%，她的箭矢在射向目标时击中沿途所有敌人。每次命中敌人都有单独的暴击几率。

specializationDescription.original: Catti-brie strengthens her bow for more powerful shots
specializationDescription.display: 凯蒂布莉儿强化弓箭，施放更有力射击

description.desc: Increases the base effect of $(upgrade_name id) to $(amt)% per stack and $source only loses half of her existing stacks when changing areas instead of all of them.
每层堆叠均使$(upgrade_name id)的基础效果提高 $(amt)%，并且$source改变区域时只会丢失现有层数的一半，而非全部。

specializationDescription.display: 凯蒂布莉儿专注于向前推进

description.desc: Additively increases the critical hit chance of all Companions of the Hall Champions by $(amount)%.
使所有秘银五侠勇士的暴击几率提高 $(amount)%（加算）。

specializationDescription.original: Catti-brie shares her Critical Hit secrets with the Champions of the Hall
specializationDescription.display: 凯蒂布莉儿与秘银厅勇士分享她的暴击秘诀

description.desc: Your formation gains one Mithral Hall stack. $source increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Mithral Hall stack you have, stacking multiplicatively.
你的阵型获得一层秘银厅堆叠。每层秘银厅堆叠均使$source的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 凯蒂布莉儿秘银厅堆叠层数

description.original: Drizzt knows more than just swords.
description.display: 崔斯特精通的不只是剑术。

description.original: Sharpest eye in the north.
description.display: 北方最敏锐的眼睛。

description.original: Trust the wind, at least when it's not BEING HORRIBLE!
description.display: 相信风，至少在风不是那么恐怖的时候！

description.original: It's not just that I hit ye; it's how many times I hit ye.
description.display: 重点不在于我击中了你，而在于我击中你多少次。

description.original: For the Companions of the Hall! For Faerûn!
description.display: 为了秘银五侠！为了费伦！

description.original: This won't be the final test we face! But we will pass it!
description.display: 这不会是我们所面临的最后一次考验！但我们会通过考验的！

description.original: Every backstep they take is more ground for us.
description.display: 对方后退的每一步都是我们的新立足点。

description.original: The Unicorn Queen guides our strike!
description.display: 独角兽女王引导我们进攻！

description.original: When ye see my arrow fly -- strike true!
description.display: 看到我的箭射出时，全力攻击！

description.original: Aye, what's this?
description.display: 是的，这是什么？

effects.description: Catti-brie also counts as a Dwarf

description.original: I'll know them when I see them. Attack on my signal.
description.display: 机不可失，时不再来。看我的信号攻击。

description.original: I can pull my bowstring back even further!
description.display: 我可以把弓弦拉得更满！

description.original: What? I'm not charming enough for you?
description.display: 什么？我对你来说还不够有魅力？

description.original: Aye, I know how to use a warhammer.
description.display: 没错，我会使用战锤。

description.original: Behind you! I've got them!
description.display: 我掩护你！交给我吧！

description.original: Ye should have worn a helm.
description.display: 你应该戴上头盔。

description.original: Aye, these arrows do go through most armor.
description.display: 没错，这些箭矢能够刺穿大多数盔甲。

description.original: They won't see this coming.
description.display: 绝对出乎他们的意料。

name.display: 特别客座明星凯蒂布莉儿

character_sheet_details.backstory: Catti-brie is a kind, tolerant, and pragmatic warrior. She has spent much of her life adventuring with the legendary Companions of the Hall, accompanying Drizzt Do'Urden, Bruenor Battlehammer, Regis, and Wulfgar on numerous escapades. As the moral compass of the group, Catti-brie helps guide her companions to wise actions through common sense and clear insight. She wields the legendary bow Taulmaril, which shoots silver arrows.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Catti-brie can crit enemies for massive damage. She gets bonuses for hitting enemies that are far away and primes all enemies she hits to take extra damage.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 凯蒂布莉儿是一位善良、宽容而务实的战士。她一生中的大部分时间，都和传奇的秘银厅同伴们在一起。她陪伴着崔斯特·杜垩登、布鲁诺·战锤、瑞吉斯和沃夫加，进行了无数的冒险。作为团体的道德指南针，凯蒂布莉儿通过常识和清晰的洞察力，引导她的同伴们采取明智的行动。她的武器是能射出银色箭矢的传奇武器陶玛礼穿心弓。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 凯蒂布莉儿能够对敌人暴击，并造成大量伤害。她能在命中远处敌人时获得额外伤害，并使她击中的所有敌人受到额外伤害。
